overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city. The camera descends from an upper concrete walkway to a lower wooden dock, approaching two NPCs sitting by the water. Bright midday sun illuminates modern skyscrapers under construction in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with futuristic city views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper waterfront promenade, passing palm trees and food kiosks

entered.detail: wide concrete walkway with metal safety railing along the water edge
silver metal safety barrier separating walkway from water
distinctive red structural arches forming part of the waterfront architecture
tall modern skyscrapers with glass facades and construction cranes
tropical palm tree growing from planter on the promenade
small curved food stand with graffiti and signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated concrete waterfront promenade in a futuristic city. The path is lined with a metal railing on the left overlooking the water, while distinctive red architectural arches and modern skyscrapers dominate the right side and background. A palm tree and food kiosk are passed along the walkway under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway descending to lower waterfront dock

events.description: turns left and begins descending concrete stairs from upper promenade to lower dock level

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down concrete stairs toward the wooden dock below

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading down to water level
thick cylindrical pillars supporting the upper promenade structure above
lower waterfront platform with wooden plank surface visible at bottom of stairs

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the upper promenade by descending a concrete stairway. The camera moves down toward the wooden dock level, passing under the upper deck supported by concrete pillars. The water becomes more visible to the left while the upper level structures recede behind and above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock under elevated promenade

events.description: two people sitting on the dock edge come into view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock toward two individuals sitting by the water's edge

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the wooden dock edge facing the water, one appears to be fishing or holding something

entered.detail: light brown wooden plank walkway extending along the water under the upper deck
sandy shoreline visible across the water on the opposite bank

segments.scene_description: Walking along the lower wooden dock sheltered beneath the upper promenade. The space is shaded with diffused light filtering through, supported by concrete pillars on the right. The water is now immediately adjacent on the left, with a sandy beach visible across the channel. Two NPCs are sitting on the dock edge ahead, facing the water as the camera approaches them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an elevated, sun-drenched urban promenade down to a shaded waterfront dock. It begins by walking along a concrete walkway lined with a metal railing, passing a palm tree and food kiosk while red architectural arches and skyscrapers tower under the bright midday sun. As the camera reaches a concrete stairway, it descends from the upper level, moving beneath the promenade's deck as the city structures recede above. The scene then shifts into a shaded area supported by concrete pillars, where the lighting becomes diffused and the water moves immediately to the left. Finally, the camera advances along the wooden dock toward a sandy beach across the channel, approaching two NPCs sitting at the water's edge.
